items.title: Oil prices plunge as Iran says Strait 'open'
items.summary: Brent crude sinks by a tenth after Iran says the key waterway is open for commercial ships for the rest of the ceasefire.

items.title: Ceasefire with Israel brings respite to Lebanon, but obstacles to peace remain
items.summary: The halt to weeks of fighting is being celebrated in Lebanon, but it will be difficult to ensure it lasts.

items.title: Kanye West concert in Poland cancelled over antisemitic comments
items.summary: The UK government blocked the rapper from entering the country over his history of making pro-Nazi and racist statements.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 以黎停火生效　黎巴嫩總統：將推動永久性協議
items.summary: 黎巴嫩總統奧恩（Joseph Aoun）今天指出，在以色列與黎巴嫩武裝組織真主黨（Hezbollah）為期10天的停火生效後，黎巴嫩正邁向以「永久性協議」為核心的「新階段」。  在美國總統川...…

items.title: 荷莫茲海峽解封和黎巴嫩停火　川普稱美伊協議已無癥結點
items.summary: 美國總統川普今天告訴法新社，與伊朗達成和平協議已經「沒有任何癥結點」，並表示協議「非常接近」，同時德黑蘭宣布荷莫茲海峽（Strait of Hormuz）已對商業航運開放。  來自華府的正面...…

items.title: 稱伊朗不再封荷姆茲！ 川普2小時連發6文宣佈好消息 再批北約「沒用」
items.summary: 美國總統川普17日一連串發文，為伊朗戰爭以來，遭德黑蘭實質封鎖的荷姆茲海峽航運，以及以色列和黎巴嫩停火帶來好消息。他同時也再度批評北大西洋公約組織（NATO）「沒用」。  ...…
